Name: Prompt to Sync Previously Skipped Invoice to QuickBooks
Precondition: Elefta must be connected to QuickBooks
Objective:
To verify that a previously skipped invoice triggers a prompt to sync with 
QuickBooks when manually reattempted, ensuring proper handling under manual 
sync settings.
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step:
Navigate to "Sales" and create new invoice (order), after pressing "Save" 
button a "Sync To QuickBooks" modal will appear, select "No".
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re:
After creating a new invoice in the "Sales" section and clicking the "Save" 
button, the "Sync to QuickBooks" modal appears. When "No" is selected, the 
invoice is saved without being synced to QuickBooks.

Name: Prompt to Sync Previously Skipped Invoice to QuickBooks
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step:
After saving the invoice (order), you will be redirected to "Sales" page, 
select the invoice you've created.
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re:
After saving the invoice, the system redirects to the "Sales" page. The 
newly created invoice is visible and can be selected from the list.

Name: Prompt to Sync Previously Skipped Invoice to QuickBooks
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Edit the product price or add a product then select "Save" button
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re:
The changes to the invoice (e.g., updated product price or added product) 
are saved successfully after clicking the "Save" button, and a "Sync to 
QuickBooks" modal appears again to confirm if the updated invoice should be 
synced.

Name: Prompt to Sync Previously Skipped Invoice to QuickBooks
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: After saving, select the QuickBooks icon at the top.
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re:
Clicking the QuickBooks icon at the top opens the sync options or status 
window, allowing the user to manually initiate syncing the invoice to 
QuickBooks.

Name: Prompt to Sync Previously Skipped Invoice to QuickBooks
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: The previous skipped invoice will now be sync to the QuickBooks.
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re:
The previously skipped invoice is successfully synced to QuickBooks after 
manually initiating the sync via the QuickBooks icon. The sync status is 
updated accordingly.

Name: Validate Race Condition on Memo Cancellation Flow
Objective:
To verify that no race condition occurs when canceling a memo after marking 
the product as "On Hand", and to ensure that the system does not 
incorrectly assume the product is still on hand, which would prevent the 
cancellation.
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Create a new memo and add products to it.
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re:
Memo is successfully created and products are added and visible in the 
memo.

Name: Validate Race Condition on Memo Cancellation Flow
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Change the product status to "On Hand"
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: Product status is updated to "On Hand" in the system without errors.

Name: Validate Race Condition on Memo Cancellation Flow
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Attempt to cancel the memo (or simulate invoice cancellation).
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re:
Memo status updates to "Cancelled" correctly, without the system thinking 
the product is still "on hand". No blocking or logic error occurs.

Name: Verify that the Inventory tab does not display duplicate items when scrolling.
Precondition:
* User is logged into the application with access to the Inventory tab

    * Inventory contains multiple unique items

    * Inventory list is long enough to require scrolling (pagination or
      infinite scroll implemented)
Objective:
To ensure that the inventory listing displays each item only once, 
regardless of how far the user scrolls. This test aims to catch issues

Name: Product Cannot Be in Two Different Invoices
Precondition:

simultaneously. This ensures accurate tracking and prevents duplication 
errors.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re:

existing invoices.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: A new invoice form should be opened, ready for input of invoice details.

Attempt to add the same product that is already present in another 
existing invoice.
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re:
The system should prevent the product from being added to multiple 
invoices.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Save the new invoice.
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re:

product with one that is not already linked to any existing invoices.
